basic_details.job_title: JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre For Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) has released the official Research Associate Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 35 years of age with a Ph.D./ MD/ MS/ MDS or equivalent degree, or three years of research, teaching, design and development experience after MVSc/ M.Pharm./ M.E./ M.Tech. with at least one research paper published in a Science Citation Index (SCI) journal can apply through email on or before 27 July 2026. The official notification PDF and applicat

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D./MD/MS/MDS or equivalent degree OR three years of research, teaching, design and development after MVSc/M.Pharm/M.E/M.Tech with at least one research paper in Science Citation Index (SCI) Journal.
qualification.details: Research Associate: Ph.D./MD/MS/MDS or equivalent degree OR three years of research, teaching, design and development after MVSc/M.Pharm/M.E/M.Tech with at least one research paper in Science Citation Index (SCI) Journal. Desirable: strong expertise in first-principles density-functional theory (DFT) calculations, including electronic-structure analysis, phonon and magnetization calculations, and experience with advanced workflows such as EPW and related computational techniques.

salary_details.details: Rs. 47,000/- to Rs. 54,000/- plus 24% HRA Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.jawaharlal_nehru_centre_for_advanced_sci: Ph.D./MD/MS/MDS or equivalent degree OR three years of research, teaching, design and development after MVSc/M.Pharm/M.E/M.Tech with at least one research paper in Science Citation Index (SCI) Journal.

content_sections.heading: JNCASR Research Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the JNCASR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download JNCASR Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JNCASR Research Associate Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Research Associate: Ph.D./MD/MS/MDS or equivalent degree OR three years of research, teaching, design and development after MVSc/M.Pharm/M.E/M.Tech with at least one research paper in Science Citation Index (SCI) Journal. Desirable: strong expertise in first-principles density-functional theory (DFT) calculations, including electronic-structure analysis, phonon and magnetization calculations, and experience with advanced workflows such as EPW and related computational techniques.

content_sections.heading: JNCASR Research Associate Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Rs. 47,000/- to Rs. 54,000/- plus 24% HRA Per Month

content_sections.heading: JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JNCASR Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Research Associate position at JNCASR is 27th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Ph.D./MD/MS/MDS or equivalent degree, or three years of research experience after MVSc/M.Pharm/M.E/M.Tech with a publication in an SCI journal.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 47,000/- to Rs. 54,000/- per month, plus 24% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the JNCASR Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the email is sent before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate position will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this JNCASR recruitment?
faq.answer: The position of Research Associate is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Jawaharlal Nehru Centre For Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR).

faq.question: Q10. Where is JNCASR located?
faq.answer: JNCASR is located in Bengaluru, Karnataka, with the pincode 560064.
